header.title: Settings
header.description: Configure the receptionist, hours, services, and transfer policy.

profile.title: Receptionist Profile
profile.description: Define the voice, tone, booking policy, and transfer rules that shape your receptionist.

hours.title: Opening Hours
hours.description: Structured hours stay authoritative over documents and help the receptionist answer availability questions reliably.
hours.leaveBlank: Leave a day blank to mark it closed.

services.title: Services
services.description: Service definitions power both booking logic and the receptionist snapshot callers hear.

phoneRouting.title: Phone Number Routing
phoneRouting.description: Map Twilio numbers to this business so live calls and SMS load the correct receptionist snapshot.
phoneRouting.saveFailed: Failed to save phone number routing.
phoneRouting.noSid: No Twilio Phone SID saved yet.
phoneRouting.empty: No Twilio numbers are mapped yet. Add the live number you configured in Twilio using exact E.164 format.

team.title: Bookable Team
team.description: Booking only works for services that have at least one active team member assigned.
team.name: Name
team.assignmentDescription: Choose which services each team member can book over phone or SMS.
team.emptyStaff: Add at least one team member before assigning services.
team.emptyServices: Add services first, then come back here to make them bookable.

snapshot.title: Receptionist Snapshot
snapshot.description: The voice gateway pulls this business context once when a live call begins.
snapshot.emptyDigest: No generated digest yet. Add FAQs or documents to enrich the receptionist.

nextSteps.title: What to do next
nextSteps.description: Tighten the live receptionist behavior before you route real traffic.
nextSteps.hours: Set hours, services, and bookable team assignments so booking can suggest real times.
nextSteps.transfer: Add transfer rules and a fallback number before handing off urgent calls.
nextSteps.snapshot: Refresh your snapshot after major policy changes so voice picks them up quickly.
